name: linSlFSMSetState
title: linSlFSMSetState
syntax: void linSlFSMSetState(unsigned int slaveId, unsigned int stateId);
description: Switches the Slave with identifier slaveId to the state stateId.

parameters.name: slaveId
parameters.description: Identifier of the relevant Slave. Corresponds to the slaveId, that was defined with linSlSimulate.
